title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-16
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health statuses and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: The monitor-head robot acting as a gardener, checking on the 'greenhouse' of apps. Polly the bee is helping by taking notes on a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a watering can, tending to a digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a watering can, tending to a digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants.
